breakdown: This PR refactors the rewards engine by moving level-up and reward-related functions (_is_state_flag_false, resolve_level_up_signal, ensure_rewards_box, etc.) from game_state.py to a dedicated rewards_engine module, improving single-responsibility. It also reorganizes wiki files from tips/ to sources/. The code moves appear architecturally sound but the diff is truncated so the actual rewards_engine implementation quality (types, error handling, docs) cannot be fully assessed.
key_changes: Move level-up functions from game_state to rewards_engine module
Update world_logic imports to use rewards_engine instead of game_state for reward functions
Refactor test imports for session_header_utils enrichment
Fix test target from streaming_orchestrator to llm_parser for lazy loading tests
